content:
## Page Section / Title
Typography

## All Verbatim Text
- **Header**: "Brand Guidelines | by Sightbox"
- **Main Heading**: "INTER TYPEFACE"
- **Alphabet/Characters**: "ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ"  
  "abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz"  
  "0123456789 @#$%&*?!{(<"
- **Section Title**: "3.2 Typography"
- **Subheading**: "WEB SAFE"
- **Body Copy**: "The web-safe font serves as a fallback option when the primary typeface is unavailable. It ensures consistent readability and presentation across various devices and browsers. This fallback guarantees that our content remains clear and accessible, even in environments where custom fonts may not load properly."
- **Font Weights (Left Column)**: "Thin Italic"  
  "ExtraLight Italic"  
  "Light Italic"
- **Font Weights (Middle Column)**: "Regular Italic"  
  "Medium Italic"  
  "SemiBold Italic"
- **Font Weights (Right Column)**: "Bold Italic"  
  "ExtraBold Italic"  
  "Black Italic"

## Visual Elements
- **Logos**: A small, abstract logo (likely a stylized "S" or geometric mark) appears in the top-right corner. No specific construction details, clear space, or minimum size rules are visible.
- **Color Palette**: Only black (#000000) and white (#FFFFFF) are used. No named swatches or HEX/RGB values are shown.
- **Typography**:  
  - **Typeface**: Inter (primary) + Web-safe fallback (unnamed, implied to be a standard sans-serif).  
  - **Weights Shown**: Thin Italic, ExtraLight Italic, Light Italic, Regular Italic, Medium Italic, SemiBold Italic, Bold Italic, ExtraBold Italic, Black Italic.  
  - **Sample Text**: Full alphabet (uppercase/lowercase), numerals, and punctuation (e.g., "@#$%&*?!{(<").
- **Imagery / Photography**: None—page is text-heavy with typographic samples.
- **Iconography**: None.
- **Layout Grid**: Implied grid with left-aligned section title ("3.2 Typography") and centered main content (typeface samples). Columns for font weights (3 columns: left/middle/right) are evenly spaced.
- **Geometric / Decorative Elements**: None—minimalist design with clean lines and negative space.

## Page Layout Summary
- **Header**: Top-left ("Brand Guidelines | by Sightbox") and top-right (small logo) aligned.  
- **Main Content**: Centered vertically and horizontally, with "INTER TYPEFACE" as the dominant heading.  
- **Section Title**: Left-aligned below the header, with body copy indented underneath.  
- **Font Weights**: Arranged in three columns (left: Thin/ExtraLight/Light; middle: Regular/Medium/SemiBold; right: Bold/ExtraBold/Black) below the alphabet sample.  
- **Spacing**: Generous white space around text elements for clarity.

## Design Rules / Guidance Visible on Page
- **Web-Safe Fallback**: Explicitly states the web-safe font is a fallback for when the primary typeface (Inter) is unavailable, ensuring readability across devices/browsers.  
- **Font Usage**: Demonstrates 9 italic weights of Inter, with no explicit "do/don't" rules beyond the fallback guidance.  
- **Layout**: Implied consistency in alignment (left for section titles, center for main headings) and spacing.
